title: Coco Gauff Wins Despite Feeling Sick
summary: Coco Gauff is a tennis player from the United States. She played a match in Madrid, Spain, against Sorana Cirstea from Romania. During the match, Coco felt very sick. She had a stomach virus and even threw up into a bin. But she did not give up! She kept playing and won the match. The final score was 4-6, 7-5, 6-1. After the match, Coco said she did not know how she won. She took some medicine that helped her feel better. Now Coco will play another match against a player named Linda Noskova. Coco is getting ready for the French Open, a big tennis tournament in Paris. She won the French Open last year and wants to win again. Also, a British player named Cameron Norrie won his match and will play against the world's best player, Jannik Sinner.

keywords.explanation: A sickness that makes your stomach hurt and can make you throw up
A part of a tennis match. You need to win six games to win a set
A rank given to good players so they don't play each other early in a tournament

background_read: Coco Gauff is a famous American tennis player. She is only 20 years old but has already won big tournaments. The French Open is a major tennis event played on clay courts in Paris. Tennis matches are divided into sets, and players need to win two out of three sets to win a match.
Article_Structure: WHAT: She won a tennis match against Sorana Cirstea
WHY: To advance to the next round and prepare for the French Open

perspectives.description: She felt sick but pushed through and won.
She played well but lost to a tough opponent.
